parameters.name: rgba
parameters.label: First RGBA Contains
parameters.description: Determines how the 's pixels should be interpreted.

parameters.name: maxpointsenable
parameters.label: Max Number of Points
parameters.description: Enable the setting of the max number of points when First RGBA Contains is set to Position.

parameters.name: input
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for TOPs to convert.

parameters.name: input0top
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: Sets reference to a to convert.

parameters.name: input0chanscope
parameters.label: Channel Scope
parameters.description: Color channels to sample.

parameters.name: input0attrscope
parameters.label: Attribute Scope
parameters.description: A list of attributes to be created according to the channel scope.

parameters.name: input0filter
parameters.label: Filter
parameters.description: The pixel filtering.

parameters.name: attr
parameters.label: New Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks to create new attributes.

parameters.name: attr0name
parameters.label: New Attribute Name
parameters.description: Choose to create a predefined attribute or a custom attribute.

parameters.name: attr0type
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: Determines the type.

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines the primitive used to connect the points.

parameters.name: uniquepoints
parameters.label: Unique Points
parameters.description: Enable not sharing points between primitives.

parameters.name: pixelsamplingloc
parameters.label: Pixel Sampling Location
parameters.description: Sets where the pixels are sampled.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the texture coordinates should be created.

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.label: Append Dimension
parameters.description: Always add a dimension, or only add a dimesion when its size is 2 or more.

parameters.name: camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Specify the camera component.

parameters.name: overridecamera
parameters.label: Override Camera View
parameters.description: When on, overrides the View settings from the selected camera object.

parameters.name: viewanglemethod
parameters.label: View Angle Method
parameters.description: Sets the method to convert the depth .

parameters.name: fov
parameters.label: FOV Angle
parameters.description: Determines the camera's field of view angle.

parameters.name: deletenear
parameters.label: Delete Near Points
parameters.description: Enable removal of points that are close to the camera.

parameters.name: depthnear
parameters.label: Near Depth
parameters.description: Depth of the near clipping plane.

parameters.name: deletefar
parameters.label: Delete Far Points
parameters.description: Enable removal of points that are far from the camera.

parameters.name: depthfar
parameters.label: Far Depth
parameters.description: Depth of the far clipping plane.

parameters.name: linestripbehavior
parameters.label: Line Strip Behavior
parameters.description: What to do when points of a line strip are deleted.

parameters.name: dispscale
parameters.label: Displacement Scale
parameters.description: Sets the displacement scale when the pixels are interpreted as heights values

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

parameters.name: attr0defaultval3
parameters.label: Attr0Defaultval3
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0numcomps
parameters.label: Attr0Numcomps
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: attr0customname
parameters.label: Attr0Customname
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
